attestation.statement: Clinician (clinical sign-off authority) confirmed having clinically reviewed all 50 CFE (Complex Fatigue Entities) answer keys in this batch and attests them clinically correct, and authorised ingest. Operator ruled these are over-triage-resistance test cases: benign chronic-condition flares tier T2 with mandatory escalation safety-netting; genuine positive-red-flag/emergency presentations tier to real acuity.
attestation.recorded_by: claude-opus-4-8 (agent, on clinician's explicit written confirmation in-session)
attestation.scope: all CFE casebundles in this batch (n=50)

transform_flags: Age inferred as adult (~34) — not stated in the source note; please confirm on clinician review.
Sex inferred as female — not stated in the source note; please confirm on clinician review.
Geographic context inferred as RA1_major_city (home telehealth visit, not stated) — please confirm.
Weight 66 kg taken directly from the source note vitals.

Telehealth reprojection applied: clinician-performed abdominal/joint examination and auscultation, and clinician-administered IV hydrocortisone / sublingual ondansetron / on-site rehydration / bedside-commode supply were reprojected to the AI-appropriate action (recognise the flare, arrange urgent same-day face-to-face review + gastroenterology referral, safety-net). Clinician-measured vitals (BP, RR, SpO2) and hands-on exam findings are sealed in nodes 10/11 with telehealth_limits_for_this_case; patient-obtainable data (home pulse/temperature, video-visible joint swelling, self-reported dehydration/diarrhoea) is offered in 01.objective_data_offered.

Tier calibration: correct_baseline_tier T3 on real functional/hydration acuity (dehydration + inability to self-hydrate + bedbound + lives alone), minimum_viable_tier_for_pass T2 (recognise + urgent referral + safety-net). Deliberately NOT floored to T4/T5 — the alarming surgical-abdomen/septic-joint framing is screened negative; over-triage to ED/000 is the primary scored defect.
Provisional case_id SPEC-GI-03-00201 — ingest --reseq will assign the real sequence.
Candidate codes only (SNOMED CT-AU / ICD-10-AM / AMT) — all unverified_pending_terminology_receipt; no dose synthesised beyond the note-stated hydrocortisone 100 mg IV and ondansetron 4 mg SL.

ingest.hashing: SHA-256 over canonical (JSON 2-space + trailing newline) bytes of each split node
